headline: Why Eaton (ETN) Is Expanding Switchgear Capacity for the AI Data Center Buildout
summary: Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) is one of the best grid modernization stocks to buy for AI infrastructure. On April 8, Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) announced that it would invest more than $30 million in a new 370,000-square-foot manufacturing facility near Omaha, Nebraska, to expand U.S. production of medium-voltage switchgear.
